_comment: adman non-secret config defaults (CONF-01/02/03). Source-of-truth values for a fresh .store/config.json. Empty ManagedOUs => a fresh install fails closed until configured (CONF-02). Keys prefixed '_comment' are stripped by the loader before validation (D-04) and are NOT written into the runtime .store/config.json.

DenyList.note: starter, not exhaustive - built-in Administrator (RID 500), matched by SID/RID (D-05)
starter, not exhaustive - Guest (RID 501), matched by SID/RID (D-05)
starter, not exhaustive - krbtgt (RID 502), matched by SID/RID (D-05)

bulk._comment_maxCount: Placeholder cap only. ENFORCEMENT is Phase 4 (BULK-02); not enforced in Phase 0.
